raw.message: Your favorite robot PvP just got hotter!

hook.summary: High-intensity mech combat with rapid gunfire and energy effects.
hook.visual_action: A blue mech fires dual machine guns at an enemy, triggering purple energy rings on the ground.

scene_flow: Mech engages in intense dual-gun combat in a rocky arena.
Purple energy effects trigger on the ground during the firefight.
The player achieves a 'DOUBLE KILL' notification after destroying enemies.
Final transition to a TikTok Lite promotional screen with video thumbnails.
on_screen_text: Assista e baixe status vídeos ilimitados no TikTok Lite
cta_text: Assista e baixe status vídeos ilimitados no TikTok Lite
audience_proxy: Portuguese-speaking mobile gamers interested in high-action mech combat and social video sharing.
